name: Holojustice Wall
description:
So I was looking at vtuber bots when I spotted this HoloX Glory Wall Bot by Slugman and it got me to remember the artist Xtecchi which they used for the thumbnail. And after looking through their catalog I spotted a couple pieces of artwork that could be fun for a bot, so here's this one. Oh and I noticed the new feature involving making multiple different starter messages so I decided to do that with this bot as well as two others.

With those being:

My Second Holo10 bot.

And My Holoadvent roommates bot

So have fun trying out those, although I realize now the theming between those two is oddly similar.

As for the full image used for the thumbnail Here it is.

Gonna try and make more starting messages when I can get around to it for my other bots since it was surprisingly fun to just write a random new starter, especially when it can be more than just a good intro for a regular bot. Anyways as per usual lemme know if there's any problems with the bot and I hope you enjoy it.

Edit: Also I finally brought the description images back for my Holowall Bot.
creator: Pandapple
